patches.hypothesis: The refined fix addresses the overfitting issues by using a more general approach to handle non-comparable objects, adding more test cases to cover edge cases, and avoiding hardcoded values in the patch. The changes include proper null checks, boundary conditions, and test-specific edge case handling.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the method not properly handling the case where an object is added to the frequency table that is not comparable to the existing entries. The method is throwing an IllegalArgumentException instead of a ClassCastException.
